name: Topgolf Allen
about: Topgolf Allen is a premier entertainment destination in Allen, TX, featuring all-weather hitting bays equipped with HDTVs and climate control for year-round play. The venue utilizes high-tech golf balls that automatically score players' shots at giant outfield targets. Each hitting bay can accommodate up to six players, and the facility offers a full-service bar and restaurant. Pricing is structured per hour, per bay, with various promotions available throughout the week, including half-off golf on weekdays and special event nights on weekends.
why_golfers_like_it: All-weather climate-controlled bays ensure comfortable play year-round
High-tech golf balls provide automatic scoring, eliminating manual scorekeeping
Versatile private event spaces are available for groups and corporate outings

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen with a diverse menu including vegetarian and gluten-free options, though outside food is not permitted except for store-bought cakes for celebrations.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, Topgolf provides complimentary clubs for use, though you are welcome to bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and beverages are not permitted due to health and safety practices, with the exception of store-bought cakes for birthdays or celebrations.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, a standard game of Topgolf typically consists of 9 holes, with the duration depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is Topgolf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Topgolf is family-friendly. However, anyone under 16 must be supervised by a guest 21+, and anyone under 18 must be supervised by a guest 21+ after 9 PM.
